item.title: Google Cloud Certified Professional Cloud Developer
item.description: Key Fundamentals To Know Microservices The Twelve Factor App Message Buses SQL Joins GCP Services Cloud IAM Cloud Storage Cloud SQL Cloud Bigtable Cloud Bigtable Best Practices Cloud Firestore Compute Engine Operating Applications on Compute Engine GCP Load Balancing Kubernetes Kubernetes Engine Kubernetes Patterns Pub Sub App Engine Cloud Run Cloud Functions Cloud Endpoints API Gateway Vertex AI Cloud Logging Cloud Monitoring Cloud Debugger Cloud Trace Cloud Security Command Center Spinnaker Case Studies HipLocal Case Study

item.title: Google Cloud Certified Professional Cloud Architect
item.description: Key Fundamentals To Know GCP PCA Exam Guide Cloud Architecture GCP Services Data Lifecycle GCP Data Lifecycle Distributed systems OSI Layers TCP/IP How it works IPv4 and IPV6 Public vs private RFC1918 addressing SSL/TLS SSH Common TCP Ports HTTP/S URLs and URIs Verbs Caching CORS HTTP Status Codes Site Reliability Engineering SLIs, SLOs and SLAs Google Cloud Adoption Framework GCP Data Migration GCP Application Migration Compliance AI ML Lifecycle Case Studies EHR Healthcare Helicopter Racing League Mountkirk Games TerramEarth
